news.t: Best Preferred Stock ETFs for Q1 2021

overview.description: The Invesco Financial Preferred ETF (PGF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of preferred securities in the US market issued by financial institutions. PGF was launched on Dec 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: ICE Bofa Exchange-Listed Fixed Rate Financial Preferred Securities

data.title: Best Preferred Stock ETFs for Q1 2021
data.text: The best preferred stock ETFs for Q1 2021 are PFFD, EPRF, and PGF.
